summary: Verified both bug fixes: 1) Producer image upload now correctly updates counter (0/5 → 1/5) and shows thumbnail preview, 2) Product detail page flavor selector shows 3 flavors (Chocolate, Vanilla, Strawberry) with working navigation between variants
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/products/{product_id}/variants returns 3 flavor variants (Chocolate, Vanilla, Strawberry)
Backend: Variants endpoint returns packs with quantity, price, and discount_percentage
Backend: Variants endpoint returns required fields (product_id, name, flavor, price, images, packs)
Backend: Product detail endpoint returns packs configuration
Backend: Product detail endpoint returns flavor field
Backend: Upload endpoint exists and requires authentication
Backend: Legacy variants system works for products without flavor_group_id
Frontend: Create Product form loads with image uploader showing (0/5)
Frontend: Image upload updates counter from (0/5) to (1/5)
Frontend: Image upload shows thumbnail preview after successful upload
Frontend: Image upload shows success toast 'Image uploaded successfully'
Frontend: Product detail page shows flavor selector with 3 flavors
Frontend: Product detail page shows pack selector with 3 options (1 unit, Pack de 3, Pack de 6)
Frontend: Pack selector shows correct prices (€10.00, €28.50, €52.00)
Frontend: Pack selector shows discount badges (-5%, -13%)
Frontend: Clicking different flavor navigates to correct product URL
Frontend: Flavor navigation updates product title correctly
critical_code_review_comments: ImageUploader setImages callback now correctly uses functional form setFormData(prev => ...) to avoid stale closure
Backend variants endpoint correctly checks flavor_group_id first, then falls back to parent_product_id
Flavor selector uses Link component for proper navigation between product variants
seed_data_creation: Used existing test product prod_98cba8b51e57 with flavor_group_id 'group_91e34419' and 3 flavor variants
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both bugs fixed and verified: 1) Producer image upload counter/thumbnail now updates correctly due to functional setFormData callback, 2) Product detail page flavor selector works with 3 flavors and navigation. Test product prod_98cba8b51e57 has Chocolate, Vanilla, Strawberry variants with packs configured.

producer_image_upload.issue: Counter and thumbnail not updating after successful upload
producer_image_upload.fix: Changed setImages callback to use functional form: setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, images: newImages(prev.images) }))
producer_image_upload.verification: Counter updates from (0/5) to (1/5), thumbnail appears, success toast shown

product_detail_flavor_selector.fix: Backend variants endpoint now checks flavor_group_id in addition to parent_product_id
product_detail_flavor_selector.verification: 3 flavors displayed (Chocolate, Vanilla, Strawberry), clicking navigates to correct product
